name: Barbecued Chicken on a Bun
recipeIngredient: 4 slices Baked ham, warmed (1 ounce each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasoned salt and black pepper.
2. Loosen one edge of the chicken skin and rub the seasoning mixture under the skin.
3. Cook the chicken skin-side down on a covered grill over medium, indirect heat for about 30-25 minutes, or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink. Remove and discard the skin.
4. Serve the chicken on buns topped with cheese, ham, and salsa. Garnish with lettuce. Serve with Savory Grilled Peaches. Makes 4 hearty sandwiches.
Conventional Oven Method:
1. Prepare as directed above.
2. Roast the skin-side up in a conventional oven at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink.
3. Continue cooking as directed.
Tip: The sandwiches are delicious served either hot or cold.
Peach-Mint Salsa:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes about 1 1/2 cups.
Savory Grilled Peaches:
1. Cut 4 fresh California peaches in half.
2. Cook on a covered grill over medium, indirect heat for 4 minutes.
3. Turn and cook an additional 4 minutes, or until heated through. Makes 4 servings.
